title: alisma plantago-aquatica f. fluitans
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica f. fluitans, also known as water plantain, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica f. fluitans include its ability to support kidney function, alleviate edema, and help manage blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Alisma plantago-aquatica f. fluitans can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
